Features.OneBedSleeping.Command.Descript: Change One-Bed Sleeping rules, for the server.
Features.OneBedSleeping.Command.Hunger.D: The rate at which hunger drops for everyone, while time is sped up.
The percentage of online players that have to sleep, before time speeds up.
Features.OneBedSleeping.Command.Allow.De: Whether sleeping is allowed or not.
Features.OneBedSleeping.SleepingDisallow: Sleeping is not allowed at this time.
Features.OneBedSleeping.SleepingAllowed: Sleeping is allowed. {0}% of players need to sleep to skip the night.
ingameerror-obs-sleeping-disallowed: Sleeping is not allowed at this time.
